pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.5 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6, causing runtime failures or missing features on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version properties from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with Java 17 settings on a Java 21 toolchain may result in warnings or failure to utilize Java 21 features; explicit target is required for correct bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from reactor-core dependency to rely on Spring Boot BOM management.
Replace springdoc-openapi-ui with springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui to support Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact springdoc-openapi-ui is incompatible with Spring Boot 3/Spring Framework 6, leading to compile errors or runtime classpath conflicts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from maven-dependency-plugin to rely on Spring Boot parent management.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to 3.15.1-SNAPSHOT and switch from source/target to release configuration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not fully support Java 21 compilation features; using 'release' is the modern standard for cross-compilation and module path handling.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from maven-source-plugin to rely on Spring Boot parent management.
Remove explicit version from maven-javadoc-plugin to rely on Spring Boot parent management.
